notes: New Digitally Sign tool: add a real cryptographic signature with your own certificate (.pfx/.p12).
Document tabs — open several PDFs and switch between them; plus a Recent files list on the start screen.
New Watermark/Stamp and Transform Pages (rotate, deskew, scale, flip) tools.
A full color picker with an on-screen eyedropper for the Draw, Line, and Text tools.
Make Searchable (OCR) now shows live page-by-page progress and can be cancelled.
